review_text: Absolutely amazing experience! The steak was cooked to perfection and the staff were incredibly attentive. Will definitely come back!
Waited over an hour for our food. When it finally arrived, the pasta was cold and bland. Very disappointing for the price.
Best coffee in town! The barista remembered my order from last week. Cozy atmosphere and great pastries.
The coffee was lukewarm and the croissant was stale. Staff seemed uninterested in helping. Won't be returning.
Really good authentic Italian food. The carbonara was rich and creamy. Service was a little slow but the food made up for it.
The curry here is the best I've ever had! Authentic flavors and generous portions. The staff explained every dish perfectly.
Food was decent but nothing special. Expected more from the glowing reviews. Service was fine.
Great craft beer selection and the nachos were perfect bar food. Lively atmosphere on weekends.
Overpriced drinks and rude bartender. Had to wait ages just to get a refill. The music was way too loud to have a conversation.
Fresh seafood, stunning ocean view, and exceptional service. Our anniversary dinner was perfect. Thank you!
The lobster bisque was excellent but the mains were mediocre. Nice setting though.
Hands down the best burger joint in the city. The double smash burger is life-changing. Always fresh and hot.
They got my order completely wrong and refused to fix it. The fries were soggy and cold. Terrible experience.
Vibrant atmosphere and incredible tacos! The salsa bar is a genius touch. Staff were friendly and fun.
Portion sizes have shrunk dramatically. We used to love this place but the quality has dropped significantly.
Fantastic tea selection and the avocado toast is Instagram-worthy and delicious. Quiet spot for working.
Good but pricey. $8 for a small latte feels steep. Atmosphere is nice though.
Best sushi I've had outside of Japan. The omakase was phenomenal. Chef came out to explain each course.
Very good quality sushi. Reservations are a must as it gets busy. Worth every penny.
Found a hair in my miso soup. When I told the waiter, they just shrugged. Absolutely unacceptable.
Farm-to-table done right. Everything was so fresh and the menu changes seasonally. Love supporting local farmers.
Beautiful rustic setting and wonderful food. The roast chicken was perfectly seasoned. Prices are fair for the quality.
Best New York style pizza outside NYC! Thin crust, generous toppings, and quick service. A neighborhood gem.
Waited 45 minutes for a takeout order that was supposed to be 20 minutes. Pizza was average at best.
Love this healthy bowl place! The build-your-own option is great and everything tastes fresh. Staff are always so cheerful.
Food is healthy but bland. Needs more seasoning options. Good for a quick lunch but nothing exciting.
The sourdough bread here is absolutely divine. Always fresh out of the oven in the morning. The cinnamon rolls are heavenly!
Great baked goods but they sell out of the popular items very early. Get there before 9am for the best selection.
Impeccable service from start to finish. The ribeye was perfectly cooked medium-rare. Excellent wine list too.
Good steak but extremely overpriced. $80 for a steak that wasn't exceptional. Nice atmosphere though.
Authentic and delicious! The ramen broth is simmered for hours and you can taste it. Best noodles in town.
Really good ramen. The pork belly add-on is worth it. Gets packed during lunch so arrive early.
Terrible WiFi despite advertising as a work-friendly cafe. Coffee was mediocre. Seating is uncomfortable.
My favorite cafe for remote work! Reliable WiFi, great coffee, and the staff never make you feel rushed.
Outstanding dim sum! The har gow and siu mai are the best I've ever had. Authentic and generous portions.
Hit or miss. Some dishes were excellent, others were mediocre. The service was chaotic during peak hours.
Finally a vegan restaurant where the food actually tastes amazing! The jackfruit tacos are incredible. Even my non-vegan friends loved it.
Overpriced for very small portions. The food was ok but not worth the cost. Disappointing.
Great place to watch the game! Multiple screens, good beer selection, and the wings are awesome.
Sticky tables, slow service, and overpriced beers. The wings were dry and overcooked.
Exquisite dining experience. The duck confit was extraordinary and the creme brulee was the best I've ever tasted. Romance at its finest.
Wonderful flavors and presentation. The wine pairing suggestions were excellent. A bit formal but that's expected.
Quick, cheap, and tasty! The street tacos are authentic and generous. Great value for money.
Got food poisoning after eating here. Reported it to the health department. Avoid at all costs!
Spectacular views and equally spectacular food. The grilled fish was fresh and beautifully seasoned. Perfect for special occasions.
The view is worth the visit but the food is overrated. Good quality but not as outstanding as the prices suggest.
Such a unique concept - cafe inside a bookstore! Great coffee, excellent book selection, and a wonderfully calm atmosphere.
Lovely spot for a quiet afternoon. Coffee is good and there's plenty of seating. Can get a bit noisy on weekends.
Our team picked this for our company dinner and everyone was blown away. Private dining room was perfect. Highly recommend for groups.
Reservation was lost, waited 30 minutes for a table we already booked. Management was unapologetic. Food was good when we finally got it.
